notes: NI Session Strings Pro 2 — studio string ensemble in Kontakt. CC 11 (Expression) is the most critical real-time controller for natural dynamics. CC 1 (Modulation) controls vibrato depth. Key switches (C0-B0 by default) switch articulations — use a separate MIDI track for key switch automation.

Expression.description: Expression — primary dynamics control. Automate this for realistic string swells and fades. The most important CC for strings.

Modulation.description: Vibrato depth — add after note attack for realistic bowing

Quick Control 1.description: Ensemble Size — number of players / width of the section

Quick Control 2.description: Close Mic Level — direct string mic (more presence/definition)

Quick Control 3.description: Room Mic Level — hall ambience (more space/blend)

Quick Control 5.description: Attack Shape — bow attack time (faster=aggressive, slower=soft legato)

Quick Control 6.description: Release Time — tail length after note release

Quick Control 7.description: Vibrato Rate — speed of automatic vibrato

Quick Control 8.description: Humanise — random timing/tuning variation between players

Stereo Width.description: Stereo image width of the ensemble
